hero.name: Maxime Parriaux
hero.title: Full-Stack Engineer · {{years}}+ years · From idea to production
hero.positioning: Versatile engineer who thrives across the stack — from React SPAs and Node microservices to cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines. Joined Dotfile as one of 3 engineers, grew with the team to 10, leading projects end-to-end. Now amplified by AI tooling to move even faster.
hero.looking_for: Looking for a high-ownership IC role with direct impact on product and architecture. Remote preferred.

ownership.title: Full ownership
ownership.description: I take features from spec to production — architecture, implementation, tests, deploy. No hand-offs, no gaps.

velocity.title: Ship & iterate
velocity.description: Working software beats perfect plans. I ship early, gather feedback, and refine. Small PRs, fast cycles.

ai.title: AI-augmented
ai.description: AI is my multiplier, not my replacement. I use it to move faster on boilerplate so I can focus on the hard problems.

bridge.title: Bridge builder
bridge.description: I translate between product, design, and engineering. I've led projects where clarity mattered more than code.

dotfile.subtitle: KYB/KYC Compliance Platform
dotfile.headline: Joined as one of 3 engineers. Grew with the team to 10.

security.title: Security & Auth
security.items: MFA (TOTP), OIDC SSO, IP whitelisting, API rate limiting, RBAC, audit logs

ai.title: AI / LLM in Production
ai.items: Automated document checks, configurable LLM analysis per document type, fraud detection, autonomous case review orchestration, LangSmith observability

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.items: 11+ providers end-to-end — Veriff, IDnow, Ubble, Resistant.AI, Workato, CompanyWatch, CreditSafe, and more

architecture.title: Architecture & Data
architecture.items: Event-driven systems, webhooks, analytics (Rudderstack + BigQuery), in-app notifications (Knock), automated emails

dx.title: Build & DX
dx.items: Webpack → Rspack migration (30s → <5s builds), Nx monorepo tooling, reusable patterns adopted team-wide

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.items: Check viewer, analytics dashboards, Chakra UI v3 migration, client portal, design system

dotfile.summary: KYB/KYC compliance platform. Joined as one of 3 engineers, led most projects end-to-end as the team grew to 10.
dotfile.achievements: Built auth layer from scratch: MFA (TOTP) & OIDC SSO, Integrated 11+ external providers (IDV, fraud detection, e-signature, iPaaS), Shipped AI doc analysis pipeline with LangSmith observability, Migrated Webpack → Rspack — build times from 30s to <5s, Onboarded multiple senior engineers as team scaled
dotfile.tags: React, Node, TypeScript, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, AWS, Terraform, K8s

smartrenting_lead.summary: Promoted to lead. Co-led a team of 5 engineers and 1 PO on the Lloyd ERP platform.
smartrenting_lead.achievements: Co-led developer team and onboarded new engineers, Implemented Terraform pipeline via GitHub Actions CI, Hosted domain-wide demos and technical presentations to stakeholders
smartrenting_lead.tags: React, Nest, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS, Terraform

smartrenting.summary: Built and scaled an internal ERP for short-term rental management — microservices, automation, AWS infrastructure.
smartrenting.achievements: Designed event-driven microservice architecture from monolith, Implemented CQRS/Event sourcing patterns with Redis, Set up AWS infra (ECS, RDS, ElastiCache) and CI/CD
smartrenting.tags: React, Nest, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS, Microservices

carrevolutis.summary: Maintained and improved a recruitment ERP — React Native app and React back office.
carrevolutis.achievements: Replaced poorly designed DAL — query performance improved 10-100×, Managed App Store & Play Store releases, Built a tech recruitment challenge with Next.js
carrevolutis.tags: React Native, React, GraphQL, Prisma, MongoDB

4js.summary: Worked on the browser integration of the Genero ERP environment.
4js.achievements: Released a web component built with Draft.js for the Genero environment

whitequest.summary: Designed and built a Cordova mobile app for clean room employee training and evaluation.
whitequest.achievements: Built full-stack training platform from the ground up for pharmaceutical/food industry

proficient.label: Proficient
proficient.items: TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, HTML, CSS, React, Node, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Tailwind, GraphQL, AWS, Redis, Terraform, K8s, Nx, Linux, Git

tools.label: Tools
tools.items: Claude Code, VS Code, Datadog, LangSmith, Linear, Figma, Notion

dotfile.title: Dotfile
dotfile.description: KYB/KYC compliance platform — the product I spent 3 years building. Auth, AI doc analysis, 11+ provider integrations.
dotfile.stack: React, Node, TypeScript, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, AWS

open-setlist.title: Open Setlist
open-setlist.description: Setlist manager PWA for musicians — song catalog, chord charts, performance mode. Runs fully offline, no backend.

lloyd.title: Lloyd
lloyd.description: Internal ERP built at Smartrenting to automate rental management — prospecting, bookings, cleaning, inventories.

bizzeo.title: Bizzeo
bizzeo.description: Mobile app for organizing networking and recruitment events in the sales industry.

web-ascii-art.title: web-ascii-art
web-ascii-art.description: One-day challenge — renders ASCII art from your camera feed using HTML Canvas and convolution.

skyquest.title: Skyquest
skyquest.description: Data crawler for Skyrock.com — a social network that forgot to implement rate limiting.

trivia.title: Beyond the code
trivia.items: My dog is basically Mr. Peanutbutter from Bojack Horseman, Founded a cover band (still active) in my hometown 10 years ago, Diamond 3 at Rocket League, Rogue-like and incremental games enthusiast, Did at least one kickflip, Binged most of the Top 500 IMDb, TOEIC 945
